## What Changed

Describe the user-visible problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Evidence

List the validation commands and their results. Do not claim checks that were not run.

## Release Checklist

- [ ] Trigger and non-trigger boundaries are explicit.
- [ ] Documentation uses plain English and includes a realistic example.
- [ ] Tests or evaluations cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_repository.py` passes.
- [ ] Examples and fixtures contain no private paths, credentials, client data, or internal URLs.
- [ ] New third-party material retains its license and attribution.
- [ ] Human acceptance is not presented as automated validation.
